title: taonabo elongata
side_effects: Taonabo elongata can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach pain due to its high levels of toxic compounds. In severe cases, it can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as respiratory failure. The plant's potent neurotoxins can also cause seizures, tremors, and confusion in individuals who ingest it in large quantities. Additionally, its improper use can exacerbate existing health conditions, such as heart problems and certain allergies.
